stage_01.reasoning: Nothing in stage_02 (node rejoin) or stage_03 (adding an ingress) has any reason to delete the log-reader deployment or the search-http/search-alt services entirely (NotFound / DNS resolution failure, not just misrouted traffic) — stage_01 explicitly forbade modifying log-reader, and no later task's goal requires removing these resources, so this is the agent carelessly destroying earlier state rather than a legitimate state transition.
